data.html:
<html><head><meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark"></head><body><pre style="word-wrap: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap;">/* ===== VARIABLES ===== */
:root {
  /* ── Z-Index Scale ── */
  --z-bg:         -1;
  --z-content:     1;
  --z-scroll-top: 200;
  --z-navbar:     300;
  --z-modal:      500;
  --z-preloader:  900;
  --z-skip:      1000;

  --primary: #6c63ff;
  --primary-dark: #5a52d5;
  --secondary: #00d4ff;
  --accent: #ff6584;
  --success: #22c55e;
  --warning: #f59e0b;
  --bg: #0a0a1a;
  --bg2: #111128;
  --bg3: #1a1a35;
  --card: #16163a;
  --card2: #1e1e45;
  --text: #e2e8f0;
  --text-muted: #94a3b8;
  --border: rgba(108,99,255,0.2);
  --gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c63ff, #00d4ff);
  --gradient2: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6584, #6c63ff);
  --shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(108,99,255,0.15);
  --radius: 16px;
  --transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.light-mode {
  --bg: #f0f4ff; --bg2: #e8eeff; --bg3: #dde4ff;
  --card: #ffffff; --card2: #f8f9ff;
  --text: #1e293b; --text-muted: #64748b;
  --border: rgba(108,99,255,0.15);
  --shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(108,99,255,0.1);
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;overflow-x:hidden}
body{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;direction:rtl;transition:var(--transition)}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}
ul{list-style:none}

/* PRELOADER */
#preloader{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index: var(--z-preloader);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:opacity .5s,visibility .5s}
#preloader.hidden{
  opacity:0 !important;
  visibility:hidden !important;
  pointer-events:none !important;
  display:none !important
}
/* CSS-only auto-hide after 5s — ultimate fallback */
@keyframes autoHidePL{
  0%,85%{opacity:1;visibility:visible}
  100%{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}
}
#preloader{animation:autoHidePL 5s ease forwards}
.loader-inner{text-align:center}
.code-text{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:2rem;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:1.5rem;animation:pulse 1s infinite}
.loader-bar{width:200px;height:4px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden}
.loader-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient);border-radius:999px;animation:loadBar 2s ease-in-out forwards}
@keyframes loadBar{from{width:0}to{width:100%}}
#particles-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index: var(--z-bg);pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
.particle{position:absolute;width:3px;height:3px;background:var(--primary);border-radius:50%;opacity:.3;animation:floatParticle linear infinite}
@keyframes floatParticle{0%{transform:translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg);opacity:0}10%{opacity:.4}90%{opacity:.2}100%{transform:translateY(-10vh) rotate(720deg);opacity:0}}

/* NAVBAR */
#navbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index: var(--z-navbar);padding:1rem 0;background:rgba(10,10,26,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition)}
#navbar.scrolled{padding:.6rem 0;background:rgba(10,10,26,.95);box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.nav-container{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:800}
.logo-icon{background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;font-size:1.6rem}
.logo-text .accent{background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:.2rem}
.nav-link{padding:.5rem .9rem;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--transition)}
.nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--text);background:var(--bg3)}
.nav-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem}
.btn-theme{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
.btn-theme:hover{border-color:var(--primary);color:var(--primary)}
.btn-primary{padding:.6rem 1.4rem;background:var(--gradient);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(108,99,255,.4)}
.hamburger{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text);font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer}
.container{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2rem}

/* SECTION HEADER */
.section-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:3rem}
.section-tag{display:inline-block;background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(108,99,255,.3);color:var(--primary);padding:.4rem 1rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:1rem}
.section-header h2{font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.section-header p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:1.05rem}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4rem;padding:8rem 2rem 4rem;max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-content{flex:1;max-width:600px}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(108,99,255,.3);color:#a78bfa;padding:.5rem 1rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.hero-title{font-size:3.2rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1.25rem}
.gradient-text{background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.hero-subtitle{font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:2rem;line-height:1.8}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-hero-primary{padding:.9rem 2rem;background:var(--gradient);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.btn-hero-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 15px 40px rgba(108,99,255,.4)}
.btn-hero-secondary{padding:.9rem 2rem;background:transparent;border:2px solid var(--primary);border-radius:12px;color:var(--primary);font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.btn-hero-secondary:hover{background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2rem}
.hero-stat{text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-size:2rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.stat-plus{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--primary)}
.stat-label{display:block;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:.2rem}
.hero-visual{flex:1;max-width:500px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.code-window{background:#0d0d1f;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-15px)}}
.window-bar{background:#1a1a35;padding:.75rem 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%}
.dot.red{background:#ff5f57}.dot.yellow{background:#febc2e}.dot.green{background:#28c840}
.window-title{margin-right:auto;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.code-content{padding:1.5rem;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8;min-height:200px;color:#e2e8f0}
.floating-badge{position:absolute;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:.5rem 1rem;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;animation:floatBadge 3s ease-in-out infinite;box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.badge-1{top:-15px;right:-10px;color:#3b82f6;animation-delay:0s}
.badge-2{top:40%;left:-20px;color:#f59e0b;animation-delay:.5s}
.badge-3{bottom:20%;right:-20px;color:#61dafb;animation-delay:1s}
.badge-4{bottom:-15px;left:20%;color:#a78bfa;animation-delay:1.5s}
@keyframes floatBadge{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-2deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(2deg)}}

/* FEATURES */
.features-section{padding:4rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.features-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:1.25rem}
@media(max-width:1100px){.features-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:768px){.features-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.feature-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;text-align:center;transition:var(--transition)}
.feature-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--primary);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.feature-icon{width:56px;height:56px;background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);border-radius:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--primary);margin:0 auto 1rem}
.feature-card h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.feature-card p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6}

/* COURSES */
.courses-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.courses-filter{display:flex;gap:.5rem;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.filter-btn{padding:.5rem 1.2rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem}
.filter-btn.active,.filter-btn:hover{background:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary);color:#fff}
.courses-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.course-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:var(--transition)}
.course-card:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border-color:var(--primary)}
.course-card.hidden{display:none}
.course-thumb{height:130px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3rem;position:relative}
.web-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e44d26,#f16529)}
.react-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#20232a,#61dafb)}
.ai-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#667eea,#764ba2)}
.node-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#215732,#3c873a)}
.flutter-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#027dfd,#54c5f8)}
.python-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#306998,#ffd43b)}
.db-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00b4d8,#0077b6)}
.ts-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3178c6,#235a97)}
.gpt-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10a37f,#1a7f64)}
.course-level{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;padding:.25rem .75rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700}
.beginner{background:rgba(34,197,94,.2);color:#22c55e;border:1px solid #22c55e}
.intermediate{background:rgba(245,158,11,.2);color:#f59e0b;border:1px solid #f59e0b}
.advanced{background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid #ef4444}
.course-body{padding:1.25rem}
.course-tags{display:flex;gap:.4rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.course-tags span{background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);color:var(--primary);padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600}
.course-body h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.course-body p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;line-height:1.5}
.course-meta{display:flex;gap:.6rem;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.course-meta i{color:var(--primary)}
.course-students{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:.75rem}
.course-students i{color:var(--success);margin-inline-start: .3rem}
.btn-course{width:100%;padding:.65rem;background:var(--gradient);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
.btn-course:hover{opacity:.9;transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* LESSONS */
.lessons-section{padding:6rem 2rem;background:var(--bg2);position:relative;z-index:1}
.lessons-tabs{display:flex;gap:.5rem;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.lesson-tab{padding:.6rem 1.4rem;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.lesson-tab.active,.lesson-tab:hover{background:var(--gradient);border-color:transparent;color:#fff}
.lessons-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.25rem}
.lesson-item{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:1.25rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
.lesson-item:hover{border-color:var(--primary);transform:translateX(-4px)}
.lesson-num{width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;color:var(--primary);font-size:.9rem;flex-shrink:0}
.lesson-info h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.lesson-info span{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.lesson-free{background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);color:#22c55e;padding:.15rem .5rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;border:1px solid #22c55e;margin-right:.5rem}

/* ROADMAP */
.roadmap-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.roadmap-container{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;position:relative}
.roadmap-container::before{content:'';position:absolute;right:27px;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;background:var(--gradient)}
.roadmap-step{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative}
.step-icon{width:56px;height:56px;min-width:56px;background:var(--gradient);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;color:#fff;z-index:1;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(108,99,255,.4)}
.step-content{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.25rem;flex:1;transition:var(--transition)}
.step-content:hover{border-color:var(--primary);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.step-num{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--primary);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}
.step-content h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;margin:.2rem 0 .4rem}
.step-content p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.875rem;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.step-skills{display:flex;gap:.4rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.step-skills span{background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);color:var(--primary);padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600}
.step-duration{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--secondary)}

/* TESTIMONIALS */
.testimonials-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.testimonials-slider{overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.testimonials-track{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;transition:transform .5s ease}
.testimonial-card{min-width:340px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;flex-shrink:0}
.testimonial-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.testimonial-text{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1.25rem;font-style:italic}
.testimonial-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem}
.author-avatar{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
.testimonial-author strong{display:block;font-size:.9rem}
.testimonial-author span{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.slider-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.slider-btn{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
.slider-btn:hover{background:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary);color:#fff}
.slider-dots{display:flex;gap:.5rem}
.slider-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition)}
.slider-dot.active{background:var(--primary);width:24px;border-radius:4px}

/* EDITOR */
.editor-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.editor-wrapper{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 1fr 1fr;gap:0;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;min-height:480px;background:#0d0d1f}
.editor-sidebar{background:#0a0a1a;border-inline-start:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.25rem;padding:.75rem .4rem}
.lang-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.2rem;padding:.6rem .4rem;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--transition)}
.lang-btn i{font-size:1.2rem}
.lang-btn:hover,.lang-btn.active{background:rgba(108,99,255,.2);color:var(--primary)}
.editor-main{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-inline-start:1px solid var(--border)}
.editor-header{background:#1a1a35;padding:.6rem 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.editor-filename{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.editor-actions{display:flex;gap:.4rem}
.btn-run,.btn-reset,.btn-copy{padding:.3rem .7rem;border-radius:6px;border:none;font-size:.78rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem}
.btn-run{background:#22c55e;color:#fff}.btn-run:hover{background:#16a34a}
.btn-reset{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text-muted)}.btn-reset:hover{color:var(--text)}
.btn-copy{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text-muted)}.btn-copy:hover{color:var(--primary)}
.editor-lines-wrap{display:flex;flex:1;overflow:hidden}
.line-numbers{background:#0a0a1a;padding:1rem .5rem;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.7;color:#4a4a8a;text-align:left;direction:ltr;min-width:36px;user-select:none;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
#codeEditor{flex:1;direction:ltr;background:#0d0d1f;color:#e2e8f0;border:none;outline:none;resize:none;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.85rem;padding:1rem;line-height:1.7;tab-size:2}
.editor-output{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.output-header{background:#1a1a35;padding:.6rem 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
#outputFrame{flex:1;border:none;background:#fff;min-height:280px}
.console-output{background:#0a0a1a;padding:.75rem;min-height:70px;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.78rem;color:#22c55e;overflow-y:auto;max-height:80px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

/* QUIZ */
.quiz-section{padding:6rem 2rem;background:var(--bg2);position:relative;z-index:1}
.quiz-wrapper{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto}
.quiz-topic-select{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2.5rem;text-align:center}
.quiz-topic-select h3{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.topic-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1rem}
.topic-btn{padding:1.25rem .75rem;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;color:var(--text)}
.topic-btn i{font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--primary)}
.topic-btn span{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600}
.topic-btn:hover{border-color:var(--primary);background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.quiz-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2.5rem}
.quiz-progress{margin-bottom:2rem}
.quiz-progress-bar{height:6px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:.5rem;overflow:hidden}
.quiz-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient);border-radius:999px;transition:width .5s ease}
#quizCounter{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.quiz-question{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.5rem;line-height:1.7}
.quiz-options{display:grid;gap:.75rem}
.quiz-option{padding:1rem 1.25rem;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-size:.95rem;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;text-align:right;color:var(--text)}
.quiz-option:hover{border-color:var(--primary);background:rgba(108,99,255,.1)}
.quiz-option.correct{border-color:#22c55e;background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);color:#22c55e}
.quiz-option.wrong{border-color:#ef4444;background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:#ef4444}
.quiz-result{text-align:center;padding:1rem;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700}

/* BLOG */
.blog-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem}
.featured-blog{grid-row:span 2}
.blog-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:var(--transition)}
.blog-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border-color:var(--primary)}
.blog-thumb{height:160px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
.featured-blog .blog-thumb{height:220px}
.blog-icon{font-size:2.5rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}
.blog-cat{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;padding:.25rem .75rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700}
.blog-body{padding:1.25rem}
.blog-meta{display:flex;gap:.75rem;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:.6rem}
.blog-meta i{color:var(--primary)}
.blog-body h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.4rem;line-height:1.5}
.blog-body p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.blog-tags{display:flex;gap:.4rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.blog-tags span{background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);color:var(--primary);padding:.2rem .5rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600}
.blog-read-more{color:var(--primary);font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;transition:var(--transition)}
.blog-read-more:hover{gap:.7rem}

/* NEWSLETTER */
.newsletter-section{padding:5rem 2rem;background:var(--bg2);position:relative;z-index:1}
.newsletter-box{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:24px;padding:3rem 2.5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.newsletter-box::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--gradient);opacity:.05;pointer-events:none}
.newsletter-icon{font-size:2.5rem;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:1rem}
.newsletter-box h2{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.newsletter-box>p{color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-size:.95rem}
.newsletter-form{display:flex;gap:.5rem;max-width:460px;margin:0 auto 1rem}
.newsletter-form input{flex:1;padding:.8rem 1rem;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;outline:none}
.newsletter-form input:focus{border-color:var(--primary)}
.newsletter-form button{padding:.8rem 1.4rem;background:var(--gradient);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.newsletter-form button:hover{opacity:.9;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.newsletter-note{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.newsletter-note i{margin-inline-start: .3rem}

/* STATS */
.stats-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.stat-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2rem;text-align:center;transition:var(--transition)}
.stat-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--primary)}
.stat-icon{font-size:2rem;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.stat-value{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
/* FOOTER */
.footer{background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:4rem 2rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;margin-bottom:3rem}
.footer-brand p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;line-height:1.7}
.social-links{display:flex;gap:.75rem}
.social-links a{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--transition)}
.social-links a:hover{background:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary);color:#fff;transform:translateY(-3px)}
.footer-links h4{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1rem}
.footer-links ul{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem}
.footer-links a{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.9rem;transition:var(--transition)}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--primary)}
.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:1.5rem;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.875rem}

/* SCROLL TOP */
.scroll-top{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;inset-inline-start:2rem;width:46px;height:46px;background:var(--gradient);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:var(--transition);z-index: var(--z-scroll-top)}
.scroll-top.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.scroll-top:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(108,99,255,.4)}

/* MODAL */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);z-index: var(--z-modal);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition)}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;visibility:visible}
.modal-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2rem;max-width:600px;width:90%;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;transform:scale(.9);transition:var(--transition)}
.modal-overlay.open .modal-box{transform:scale(1)}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:1rem;inset-inline-end:1rem;background:var(--bg3);border:none;border-radius:8px;width:36px;height:36px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--transition)}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--accent)}

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}}
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .hero{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:7rem 1.5rem 3rem;gap:2.5rem}
  .hero-btns,.hero-stats{justify-content:center}
  .hero-visual{max-width:420px}
  .courses-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .editor-wrapper{grid-template-columns:70px 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto}
  .editor-output{grid-column:1/3}
  .blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .featured-blog{grid-row:auto}
  
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:100%;right:0;left:0;background:var(--bg2);padding:1rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex}
  .hamburger{display:block}
  .hero-title{font-size:2.2rem}
  .courses-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .lessons-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .topic-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .newsletter-form{flex-direction:column}
  .editor-wrapper{grid-template-columns:1fr;grid-template-rows:auto}
  .editor-sidebar{flex-direction:row;border-inline-start:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
}


/* ===== INSTRUCTORS ===== */
.instructor-card h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.3rem}


/* ===== ARTICLES ===== */
.articles-section{padding:6rem 2rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.articles-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.75rem}
.article-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;gap:1.25rem;align-items:flex-start}
.article-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--primary);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.article-icon{font-size:2.5rem;flex-shrink:0}
.article-tag{display:inline-block;padding:.2rem .65rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;border:1px solid}
.article-card h3{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.5}
.article-card p{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.article-meta{display:flex;gap:1rem;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
.article-meta i{color:var(--primary)}
.read-more{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--primary);font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem}

/* ===== TESTIMONIALS ===== */
.testimonials-section{padding:6rem 2rem;background:var(--bg2);position:relative;z-index:1}
.testimonials-slider{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.testimonial-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem;transition:var(--transition)}
.testimonial-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--primary)}
.testimonial-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1rem}
.t-avatar{font-size:2rem}
.t-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem}
.t-role{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--primary)}
.t-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.t-text{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.7;font-style:italic}
.t-quote{font-size:2rem;color:var(--primary);opacity:.3;line-height:1;margin-bottom:.25rem}

/* QUIZ category bar */
.quiz-category-bar{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.quiz-cat-btn{padding:.35rem .9rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem}
.quiz-cat-btn.active,.quiz-cat-btn:hover{background:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary);color:#fff}
.quiz-cat-label{display:inline-block;background:rgba(108,99,255,.1);color:var(--primary);padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.75rem}

/* JS bg for course */
.js-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#323330,#F0DB4F)}
.git-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f34f29,#3e2c00)}

/* Article modal */
.article-modal-content p{color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:.75rem;font-size:.95rem}
.article-modal-content h2{margin-bottom:1rem;background:var(--gradient);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}

/* Responsive additions */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  
  .testimonials-slider{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .articles-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .testimonials-slider{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  
}

/* ═══ ACCESSIBILITY ═══ */
.skip-link{position:absolute;top:-60px;right:0;background:var(--primary);color:#fff;padding:.75rem 1.5rem;border-radius:0 0 0 12px;font-weight:700;z-index: var(--z-skip);transition:top .3s;text-decoration:none}
.skip-link:focus{top:0}

/* ═══ REDUCED MOTION ═══ */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *,*::before,*::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    scroll-behavior: auto !important;
  }
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════
   FOCUS VISIBLE — keyboard navigation a11y
   ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
  outline-offset: 3px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

button:focus-visible,
a:focus-visible,
[tabindex]:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid var(--primary);
  outline-offset: 4px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

/* ── 480px: extra small mobile ── */
@media(max-width:480px){
  .hero{padding:7rem 1rem 2.5rem;gap:1.5rem}
  .hero-visual{max-width:100%;width:100%}
  .hero-title{font-size:1.8rem}
  .hero-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch}
  .btn-hero-primary,.btn-hero-secondary{justify-content:center}
  .hero-stats{gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center}
}
</pre></body></html>
